---
title: "Test Comments Page"
format:
  html:
    comments:
      giscus:
        repo: giscus/giscus
        repo-id: "MDEwOlJlcG9zaXRvcnkzNzM2NDM1OTg="
        category: "General"
        category-id: "DIC_kwDOFjQgPs4CA_2S"
        mapping: "pathname"
        reactions-enabled: true
        input-position: "bottom"
        theme: "light"
        language: "en"
        loading: "lazy"
---

# Test Comments Page

This is a minimal test page to check if Giscus comments work in Quarto.

## Content

Here's some sample content to make sure the page renders properly.

**Mathematical example:**
$$E = mc^2$$

## Comments

The comments should appear below this section. If you see "Loading comments..." that never changes, there's a configuration issue.

If you don't see any comment section at all, Quarto isn't rendering the Giscus configuration properly.
